toolsIndex.title: Free Online Media Tools
toolsIndex.subtitle: Focused, single-purpose tools for converting, compressing, transcribing, and cleaning up image, video, and audio files. No signup. Files deleted within 24 hours.

contentStudio.name: Content Studio
contentStudio.tagline: Edit, layer, and mix video & audio on a multi-track timeline — then export MP4. A Premiere Pro–style editor, right in your browser.

needMore.title: Need more than a single-purpose tool?
needMore.body: The homepage converter bundles every option — format, AI tools, metadata, trim, transcription — into one upload. Tutorials walk through every setting.

learnMore.title: Learn more
learnMore.intro: Guides and reference pages that pair with these tools.

howItWorks.label: How Media Manipulator works
howItWorks.description: See how files are processed and temporarily stored.

contentStudio.title: Content Studio
contentStudio.tagline: Edit, layer, and mix video & audio on a multi-track timeline — then export MP4. A Premiere Pro–style editor, right in your browser.

recents.title: Recent projects
recents.empty: No projects yet. Create one to get started — your recent projects will show up here.
recents.error: Couldn't load your recent projects. Refresh to try again.

mediaBin.dropHint: Drop video, audio, or .cube LUTs here
mediaBin.empty: No media yet. Add a clip to get started.
mediaBin.dragHint: Drag onto a track, or click + to add
mediaBin.lutHint: Apply in a clip's LUT effect

preview.empty: Add a clip to preview your edit

timeline.rippleHint: Delete clip and close the gap

editor.mobileHint: Content Studio works best on a larger screen with a mouse or trackpad.
editor.shortcuts: Space play/pause · ←/→ step · S split · Del delete · +/− zoom

inspector.title: Clip effects
inspector.none: Select a single clip to edit its effects.
inspector.transitionNoPrev: Add a clip before this one to cross-dissolve.

lut.noLuts: Upload a .cube LUT in the media bin to use this effect.

effects.empty: No effects. Add Lumetri, a LUT, or a chroma key.

audio.keyframeNote: Alt-click the clip's volume line to add a point; drag to adjust, double-click to remove.

export.title: Export to MP4
export.description: Render your timeline to an MP4 on the server, then download it.

audioPanel.title: Auto-ducking
audioPanel.description: Lower other tracks while a voice-over plays.
audioPanel.noAudioTracks: Add an audio track with a voice-over to use ducking.

captions.overwriteConfirm: Replace the existing captions with a fresh transcription?
captions.empty: No captions yet. Generate them from your audio.

toolPage.notFoundBody: We could not find the tool you were looking for. Browse all available tools below.

toolLanding.whyMediaManipulatorTitle: Why Media Manipulator's version stands out
toolLanding.relatedIntro: Keep going with related Media Manipulator pages.
